title: Digital Signage Menu Definition
description: JSON schema for the digital signage menu templating engine. Defines layout, theming, and menu content for full-screen display rendering.

layout.description: Controls the overall screen layout, resolution scaling, title, and logo placement.

resolution.description: Display resolution. Sets the viewport container size: 1080=1920x1080, 2k=2560x1440, 4k=3840x2160.

orientation.description: Screen orientation. Landscape is 1920x1080 base, portrait is 1080x1920 base.

mode.description: Rendering mode. 'display' renders at native resolution with CSS scale. 'preview' scales to fit the browser viewport for previewing on any screen.

background_color.description: CSS color value for the full-screen background.

x_spacer.description: Legacy horizontal spacing fallback (px). Use viewport_padding and container.gutter instead.

y_spacer.description: Legacy vertical spacing fallback (px). Use viewport_padding and area_gap instead.

viewport_padding.description: Padding from the screen edges to the content area. Overrides x_spacer/y_spacer when present.

area_gap.description: Vertical gap in pixels between area sections. Defaults to y_spacer value.

container.description: Controls how top-level areas are arranged on screen.

columns.description: Number of columns for area layout.

gutter.description: Gap in pixels between area columns. Defaults to x_spacer value.

header.description: Top-level header region with multiple text and logo elements arranged in 3 columns (left/center/right).

height.description: Header height as % of viewport height. Auto-sizes to content if omitted.

background.description: CSS background value (color, gradient, or image URL).

divider.description: Optional bottom border below the header.

columns.description: Per-column sizing. 'fit' = wraps content tightly, 'fill' = takes available space. Defaults to 'fill'.

elements.description: Ordered list of header elements (text labels and logos).

theme.description: Font and color definitions applied globally via CSS custom properties. All values can be overridden at runtime.

divider_color.description: CSS color for dividers between items.

area_background.description: CSS color for the background of each area block.

areas.description: The menu areas (sections) containing items to display.

max_height.description: Max height as % of viewport height.

oneOf.description: Uniform padding on all sides in pixels.

font.description: Font definition with family, weight, color, and size.

family.description: CSS font-family name. Google Fonts (Montserrat, Lato, Roboto, Open Sans, Oswald) are auto-loaded.

area.description: A menu area. Either a leaf (has items) or a group (has sub-areas). Items and areas are mutually exclusive.

title.description: Display title for this section. Optional — omit for untitled groups.

padding.description: Internal padding within this area. Number or {top,right,bottom,left} object.

gutter.description: Gap between columns — item columns (leaf areas) or sub-area columns (group areas).

align.description: Horizontal alignment of the area title.

valign.description: Vertical alignment of this area within its parent grid cell.

item_align.description: Default text alignment for item names in this area.

column_count.description: Number of columns for the item grid within this leaf area (1-3).

columns.description: Number of columns for sub-area layout in a group area.

items.description: Menu items in this leaf area.

areas.description: Nested sub-areas. When present, this area is a group container. Mutually exclusive with items.

name.description: Display name of the menu item.

description.description: Optional short description shown below the item name.

price.description: Base price for this item. Always displayed when present, even alongside variations. Use with variations for patterns like 'Sandwich $10' with add-on variations.

show_variation_prices.description: When false, hide individual variation prices (useful when variations are descriptive labels only).

variations_inline.description: Display variations in a compact inline row. Set to false for stacked rows.

variations.description: Variations with individual prices, displayed as rows below the item. Can coexist with a base price for add-on pricing patterns.

id.description: Unique identifier for this variation. Used by external systems to address specific variations.

padding.description: Padding around this item. Defaults to {top:8, bottom:8}.

align.description: Text alignment for this item. Inherits from area.item_align if omitted.

hide_if_empty.description: If true, hide this item when it has no price and no variations.
